item.title: Version 1.7.3
item.description:
What's New in 1.7.3

  • Fixed weather wallpaper apply lag from the library detail sheet (same fast path as the editor)
  • Reuses cached Ken Burns loops and VersionLoops instead of regenerating on every apply
  • Instant static placeholder while preparing weather wallpapers; no black flash on switch
  • Debounced screen-parameter feedback that blocked apply for several seconds
  • Validated stale composite video paths; unified detail apply through WallpaperApplyService
